description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the ruby:3.0-alpine Docker image and a before_script that installs git via apk, installs the bundler gem, and runs bundle install --path vendor/ruby for all jobs. Configure a cache with key ruby-3.0 that stores the vendor/ruby directory. Add an rspec job (default test stage) that executes bundle exec rspec spec. Add a rubocop job (default test stage) that executes bundle exec rubocop.
